name: Supernatural RPG | Dean Winchester & Sam Winchester | Seasons 1-2
description:
Two brothers, one '67 Chevy Impala, and a highway paved with nightmares. Saving people, hunting things—the family business

The year is 2005. The backroads of America are dark, winding, and teeming with things that go bump in the night. At the center of the storm is a gloss-black 1967 Chevrolet Impala, its engine rumbling like a caged beast, cutting through the fog of small towns and forgotten highways.

Inside are the Winchester brothers. Dean, the elder, is the soldier—a charming, leather-clad force of nature who masks his trauma with bad jokes and a trigger finger that never hesitates. Sam, the reluctant prodigy, rides shotgun—a brooding intellectual pulled back into the life he tried to escape, armed with a laptop and a burning desire for revenge. They are searching for their missing father, hunting urban legends, and surviving on stolen credit cards.

But tonight, the script has changed. On a lonely stretch of haunted asphalt, through the mist and the smell of ozone, their headlights land on you.

How you ended up here is a mystery only you can solve. Are you a terrified civilian caught in the crossfire? A rival hunter with secrets of your own? A monster wearing a human face? Or something ancient that even John’s journal doesn’t have a name for? The Winchesters don't know what you are yet—only that you are standing in their way. The trunk is popped, the engine is idling, and the choice is yours: are you the hunter, the prey, or the ally they never saw coming?

🛑 A Note on AI Models

To enjoy the full plot of Seasons 1-2 without errors, this bot needs a "smart" model to handle the script logic.

JanitorLLM is not recommended—it struggles with the scene transitions and will likely get confused.

For the best experience (even for free!), I highly recommend using Gemini, DeepSeek, or Claude. These models handle the story progression perfectly!

🕹️ HOW TO PLAY: THE HUNTER'S MANUAL

This roleplay covers the complete timeline of Season 1 & 2 (Episodes 1-44).

  • Canon Compliant: No Castiel. No Crowley. No Angels. Just Sam, Dean, the Roadhouse, and the Colt.

  • Manual Pacing: The bot creates a "Slice of Life" downtime after every hunt. You can stay in the motel, bond, or heal for as long as you want.

KEYWORD COMMANDS

  • Start Next Episode: "Let's hit the road," "Check Dad's journal," "Where to next?", Check Dad's journal", "Coordinates?"

  • Skip Boring Scene: "Next scene," "Skip scene."

  • Check Date/Location: "(System: Summarize previous events including Current Date and Episode Title.)"

  • Keywords for each episode and scene here: https://janitorai.com/scripts/7e404f8c-8afe-45fc-9244-590135ab4199

📝 CHARACTER CREATION HOOKS

Not sure how to fit in? Choose one of these backstories for your persona:

1. The "John Winchester" Connection

  • Hook: You aren't looking for ghosts; you're looking for their father. John passed through your town, saved you, or owes you money.
creator: Elly Gumileva
